all.title: Live Stream Recordings — Record & Download Streams
all.description: Record and download live streams automatically with Stream Archive. Cloud-based recorder for TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango, Kick, AfreecaTV, and Pandalive streams.

tiktok.title: TikTok Live Recordings — Download & Record TikTok Streams
tiktok.description: Download TikTok live recordings and record TikTok streams automatically. Cloud-based TikTok live recorder — save TikTok live streams without screen capture. Browse all TikTok live recordings.

faqs.question: How do I record TikTok Lives automatically?
faqs.answer: Add a TikTok creator's username on Stream Archive and their Lives are recorded every time they go live. The TikTok live recorder runs in the cloud around the clock, so you never have to be online or keep a device running. Every TikTok live recording is stored and ready to watch whenever you want.

faqs.question: Can I download TikTok live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium members can download any TikTok live recording as a full video file with no watermark. You can save TikTok live streams directly to your device for offline viewing. Free users can watch all recordings through the browser player.

faqs.question: Do TikTok Lives disappear after the broadcast ends?
faqs.answer: They do. TikTok does not keep a copy of Lives once they finish, which means the content is gone permanently. Stream Archive solves this by acting as a TikTok live recorder that captures every broadcast before it vanishes. Your TikTok live recordings stay available indefinitely.

faqs.question: Do I need a screen capture app to record TikTok Lives?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Screen capture apps drain your battery, produce choppy footage, and often fail mid-stream. Stream Archive records TikTok Lives server-side in high quality with no app to install, no phone left running, and no black screen problems.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for recording TikTok Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can sign up for free and start recording TikTok Lives right away. Free accounts let you follow creators and watch all recordings. Premium plans add the ability to download TikTok live recordings and unlock extended storage.

twitch.title: Twitch Stream Recordings — Download Twitch VODs & Record Streams
twitch.description: Download Twitch VODs and record Twitch streams automatically. Cloud-based Twitch stream recorder that saves broadcasts permanently — Twitch VOD downloader with no expiry.

faqs.question: How do I record Twitch streams?
faqs.answer: Add any Twitch username on Stream Archive and every stream is recorded automatically from that point on. The Twitch stream recorder operates in the cloud, so it catches broadcasts whether you are online or not. No software to install, nothing to configure.

faqs.question: Can I download Twitch VODs before they expire?
faqs.answer: Yes. Twitch deletes VODs after 14 days for regular streamers and 60 days for Partners. Stream Archive keeps recordings permanently. Premium users can use the built-in Twitch VOD downloader to save any recording as a video file before or after it expires on Twitch.

faqs.question: How is this different from watching VODs on Twitch?
faqs.answer: Twitch VODs expire, get muted by DMCA claims, or get deleted by the streamer. Stream Archive records Twitch streams independently, so your recordings stay intact in full quality regardless of what happens on Twitch. Think of it as a permanent backup you can always download.

faqs.question: Does it record every type of Twitch stream?
faqs.answer: Yes. Gaming, Just Chatting, IRL, creative streams, and every other category are recorded automatically. The Twitch stream recorder does not filter by content type.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for recording Twitch streams?
faqs.answer: Yes. Create a free account and start recording Twitch streams immediately. Premium plans unlock the ability to download Twitch VODs as video files and provide extended storage for your recordings.

youtube.title: YouTube Live Recordings — Record & Download YouTube Streams
youtube.description: Record and download YouTube live streams automatically. Cloud-based YouTube live recorder that captures broadcasts even when replays fail, get deleted, or go private.

faqs.question: How do I record YouTube live streams?
faqs.answer: Add any YouTube channel on Stream Archive and every live broadcast is recorded automatically. The YouTube live recorder runs in the cloud, so streams are captured even if your computer is off. All recordings appear in your library ready to watch or download.

faqs.question: Why would I need a YouTube live recorder if YouTube has replays?
faqs.answer: YouTube replays are unreliable. They can fail to process, get deleted by the creator, or go private without warning. Stream Archive records YouTube live streams independently, giving you a backup that is always available to download regardless of what happens to the original.

faqs.question: Can I download YouTube live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any YouTube live recording as a video file for offline viewing. Free users can stream all recordings through the browser player.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for recording YouTube Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sign up free and start recording YouTube live streams from your favourite channels. Premium plans unlock downloading recordings and extended storage for your library.

faqs.question: How do I record Bigo Lives without a screen capture app?
faqs.answer: Add a Bigo creator's username on Stream Archive and their Lives are recorded automatically in the cloud. There is no APK to install, no screen capture running on your phone, and no black screen problems. The Bigo live recorder handles everything server-side.

faqs.question: Why do I get a black screen when trying to record Bigo Live?
faqs.answer: Black screen issues happen because Bigo's app blocks screen capture tools. Stream Archive bypasses this entirely by recording Bigo Lives directly from the server. There is no screen overlay, no app conflict, and no black screen. Recordings come out in full quality every time.

faqs.question: Can I download Bigo Live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any Bigo Live recording as a video file to keep permanently. Free users can watch all Bigo recordings instantly through the browser player.

faqs.question: Do Bigo Lives disappear after the stream ends?
faqs.answer: Yes. Bigo does not save broadcasts after they finish, so once a stream ends the content is gone. Stream Archive captures Bigo Lives as they happen and keeps the recordings available indefinitely so you can rewatch or download them whenever you want.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for recording Bigo Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. Create a free account and start recording Bigo Lives immediately. No app download, no screen capture needed. Premium plans add the ability to download Bigo live recordings and provide extended storage.

about.all:
## Live Stream Recordings on Stream Archive

Live streams are temporary by design. The moment a broadcast ends, the content is usually gone for good. Stream Archive changes that. It is a cloud-based live stream recorder that monitors your favourite creators and records their broadcasts automatically, so every stream is waiting in your library whenever you are ready to watch.

### How It Works

You add a creator by pasting their profile URL. From that point on, every time they go live on TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango, Kick, AfreecaTV, or Pandalive, Stream Archive begins recording. There is nothing to install, no screen capture running in the background, and no device that needs to stay on. The recorder runs 24/7 in the cloud.

### Watch Instantly, Download When You Want

Every recording is available to stream through the built-in player the moment the broadcast finishes. Premium members can download recordings as video files to keep offline permanently.

### One Library for Every Platform

Instead of juggling multiple apps or browser extensions for each streaming platform, Stream Archive brings all your recordings together. TikTok Lives, Twitch streams, YouTube broadcasts, Bigo Lives, Tango streams, Kick sessions, AfreecaTV shows, and Pandalive content all live in a single searchable library.
about.tiktok:
## TikTok Live Recordings

TikTok gives creators one of the most direct ways to connect with their audience, but the platform treats live content as disposable. The second a TikTok Live ends, it is gone. There is no replay button, no archive page, no way to go back and watch what you missed. If you were not there in real time, the content simply does not exist anymore.

Stream Archive was built to solve exactly this problem. It works as a TikTok live recorder that runs continuously in the cloud, watching for the moment any of your followed creators go live. When a broadcast starts, recording begins automatically. When it ends, the full TikTok live recording is stored in your library where you can rewatch it at your own pace or download it to keep.

### No Screen Capture, No Hassle

The old way of saving TikTok Lives meant running a screen capture app on your phone, draining your battery, hoping the recording would not fail halfway through, and dealing with choppy footage. Stream Archive eliminates all of that. Recording happens server-side, which means high quality capture with no app to install, no phone left running overnight, and no storage filling up on your device.

### Built for TikTok Fans Who Miss Lives

Time zones, work schedules, and sleep mean you will inevitably miss Lives from creators you follow. With Stream Archive, that stops being a problem. Add a TikTok creator once and every future Live is captured automatically. Browse your TikTok live recordings whenever it suits you, and download the ones you want to keep permanently.

### Get Started for Free

Sign up with a free account and start following TikTok creators. Their Lives are recorded automatically and available to watch in your browser. Upgrade to premium when you want to download TikTok live recordings or need more storage space.
about.twitch:
## Twitch Stream Recordings

Twitch has a built-in VOD system, but it comes with serious limitations. Regular streamers lose their VODs after just 14 days. Even Partners only get 60 days before recordings are deleted. On top of that, VODs can be muted due to DMCA takedowns, or a streamer might delete them manually. If you were counting on rewatching a favourite broadcast, there is a real chance it will not be there when you go looking for it.

Stream Archive works as a Twitch stream recorder that keeps recordings permanently. When you add a Twitch creator, every stream is recorded independently from Twitch's own VOD system. Your recordings do not expire after 14 days, they are not affected by DMCA muting, and they stay available even if the streamer deletes their channel.

### A Twitch VOD Downloader That Actually Works

Downloading VODs directly from Twitch requires third-party tools that break frequently. Stream Archive includes a built-in Twitch VOD downloader for premium users. Any recording in your library can be downloaded as a video file with a single click, no external software needed.

### Every Category, Every Stream

Whether it is a competitive gaming session, a Just Chatting marathon, an IRL adventure, or a creative stream, the Twitch stream recorder captures everything. There are no content filters and no category restrictions. If the streamer goes live, it gets recorded.

### Cloud Recording Without the CPU Hit

Desktop recording tools eat up CPU and RAM while you are trying to watch. Stream Archive records Twitch streams entirely in the cloud, so your computer stays free for gaming, working, or whatever else you are doing. No OBS configuration, no disk space concerns, no dropped frames.

### Start Recording for Free

Create a free account and add your favourite Twitch streamers. Recordings begin automatically the next time they go live. Upgrade to premium to download Twitch VODs and unlock extended storage.
about.youtube:
## YouTube Live Recordings

YouTube technically offers live stream replays, but the system is far from reliable. Replays can fail to process entirely, leaving you with nothing. Creators can delete them, set them to private, or remove their channel without warning. Even when a replay does work, it might disappear weeks later. If you rely on YouTube's own system to save live content, you are gambling.

Stream Archive provides a YouTube live recorder that works independently from YouTube's replay feature. When you add a channel, every live broadcast is recorded in the cloud and stored in your library. Even if the original replay disappears from YouTube, your recording remains available to watch or download.

### Why YouTube Replays Are Not Enough

Creators delete replays for all sorts of reasons: they said something they regret, the audio had copyright issues, or they simply wanted to clean up their channel. YouTube also fails to process replays more often than you might expect, especially for longer streams. A dedicated YouTube live recorder gives you a safety net that does not depend on the creator's decisions or YouTube's processing pipeline.

### Watch or Download on Your Terms

Every YouTube live recording is available to stream instantly through the browser player. Premium members can download recordings as video files for offline viewing, which is useful for long streams you want to watch during a commute or flight.

### Free to Get Started

Sign up for a free account and start following YouTube channels. Every live broadcast is recorded automatically and waiting in your library. Upgrade to premium when you need to download YouTube live stream recordings.
about.kick:
## Kick Stream Recordings

Kick is one of the fastest-growing live streaming platforms, and the best moments from your favourite Kick streamers deserve to be preserved. Stream Archive is a Kick stream recorder that captures every broadcast automatically, so you can catch up on streams you missed and download the ones you want to keep.

### Never Miss a Kick Broadcast

Kick streams move fast, and with creators broadcasting at all hours, it is impossible to catch everything live. Add your favourite Kick creators on Stream Archive and every stream is recorded automatically in the cloud. No software to install, no screen capture running in the background. Your library fills up with recordings while you go about your day.

### Watch and Download Kick Recordings

Every Kick recording is available to watch instantly through the browser player. Premium users can download Kick recordings as video files for offline viewing. Keep your favourite streams permanently.

### Free to Start

Sign up free and start recording Kick streams from the creators you follow. Upgrade to premium for downloads and extended storage.
about.pandalive:
## Pandalive Stream Recordings

Pandalive is one of the most popular Korean live streaming platforms, but like most live platforms, streams vanish the moment they end. If you follow Pandalive creators and cannot always watch them in real time, you are constantly missing content. Stream Archive works as a Pandalive recorder that captures broadcasts automatically so nothing slips through the cracks.

### Automatic Recording, No Software Needed

Add your favourite Pandalive creators and Stream Archive begins recording every time they go live. The Pandalive recorder runs entirely in the cloud, which means no desktop app, no browser extension, and no device that needs to stay awake. Recordings appear in your library as soon as the broadcast ends.

### Watch or Download Anytime

Every Pandalive recording is ready to watch instantly through the built-in player. Premium members can download recordings to keep offline. Whether you are catching up on a stream from earlier today or revisiting one from weeks ago, your Pandalive recordings are always there.

### Free to Start

Sign up free and start recording Pandalive streams from the creators you follow.
about.afreecatv:
## AfreecaTV Stream Recordings

AfreecaTV (also known as SOOP) is a cornerstone of Korean live streaming, with a massive community of creators covering gaming, talk shows, music, and daily life. But keeping up with every broadcast in real time is not realistic, especially across time zones. Stream Archive is an AfreecaTV recorder that captures streams automatically so you never lose access to the content you care about.

### Cloud-Based AfreecaTV Recorder

Add your favourite AfreecaTV creators on Stream Archive and recording begins the next time they go live. The recorder operates in the cloud around the clock, so broadcasts are captured whether you are watching or sleeping. There is no software to install and no device that needs to stay on.

### Download AfreecaTV Recordings

Every AfreecaTV recording is available to stream instantly through the browser player. Premium users can download recordings as video files to watch offline. Your library keeps growing as long as your creators keep streaming.

### Free to Start

Create a free account and start recording AfreecaTV streams from your favourite creators today.
about.bigo:
## Bigo Live Recordings

If you have ever tried to record a Bigo Live stream using a screen capture app, you know the frustration. Black screens, app crashes, low resolution footage, and recordings that cut off mid-stream. Bigo's app actively blocks screen capture tools, which makes the whole approach unreliable. Stream Archive takes a completely different approach. It is a Bigo live recorder that captures streams directly from the server, bypassing screen capture entirely.

### No Black Screen, No Screen Capture APK

The reason screen capture fails on Bigo is that the app detects and blocks overlay recording. Stream Archive does not use screen capture at all. Bigo Lives are recorded server-side in the cloud, which means no black screen, no APK to sideload, no permissions to grant, and no phone left running overnight. Every Bigo live recording comes out in full quality.

### Bigo Lives Disappear — Yours Will Not

Bigo does not offer replays. When a broadcast ends, the content is gone. Stream Archive captures every Bigo Live as it happens and keeps the recording in your library permanently. You can rewatch Bigo live recordings days, weeks, or months later. Premium users can download them to keep offline.

### How to Record Bigo Lives

Add a Bigo creator's username on Stream Archive. That is it. The next time they go live, the Bigo live recorder kicks in automatically. No setup, no configuration, no app on your phone. Recordings appear in your library when the broadcast finishes.

### Free to Start

Sign up free and start recording Bigo Lives right away. No screen capture, no black screen, no APK. Just automatic cloud recording. Upgrade to premium to download Bigo live recordings and unlock more storage.
about.tango:
## Tango Live Recordings

Tango is a social live streaming platform where creators broadcast everything from music performances to conversations, but the platform does not keep recordings after a stream ends. If you miss a Tango broadcast, there is no way to go back and watch it unless someone recorded it. Stream Archive is a Tango live recorder that captures streams automatically so you always have access to the content you care about.

### Automatic Tango Stream Recording

Add your favourite Tango creators and Stream Archive starts recording every time they go live. The Tango live recorder runs in the cloud, so you do not need an app on your phone, a desktop program, or a browser extension. Streams are captured in high quality and stored in your library.

### Download Tango Streams to Keep

Every Tango recording is available to stream instantly through the browser player. Premium members can download Tango live recordings as video files for offline viewing. Save the streams that matter most to you and keep them permanently.

### Never Miss Your Favourite Tango Creators

Tango creators often stream at unpredictable times. With Stream Archive, it does not matter when they go live. Every broadcast is recorded and waiting in your library. Browse your Tango recordings at your own pace, rewatch highlights, and download the ones you love.

### Free to Start

Sign up free and add your favourite Tango creators. Their streams are recorded automatically from that moment on.
